record.field: Following up on our meeting at TUTTOFOOD Milan - CasaFolino

field.name: body_html
field.p: It was a pleasure meeting you at TUTTOFOOD Milan and discussing potential opportunities together.
CasaFolino is an Italian food company based in Calabria, focused on developing and producing food references for retail, foodservice, and private label projects.
Our approach is practical and market-driven: perceived quality, reliable production continuity, shelf stability, and sustainable long-term positioning.

Our main product areas include:
- sweet and savoury spreads
- flavoured honeys and honey-based specialties
- ready-to-cook risottos
- condiments and accessible gourmet references
We manufacture in Italy under certified standards and can support retail, horeca, foodservice, and industrial formats.

Please find our company material attached. Josefina Lazzaro, CasaFolino Export Manager, is copied and will take care of the commercial follow-up to explore the product categories that may be relevant for you.
I remain at your disposal to schedule a short operational call or prepare a focused proposal covering product, format, and price positioning.

Antonio Folino
CEO & Founder - CasaFolino S.r.l. Societa Benefit
casafolino.com | Lamezia Terme (CZ), Italy
